base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ui_menus_fonts — a ui (hud_readout) from 1997 tekken 3. Tekken 3 menu UI + health bars + timer + round indicators. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Tekken 3 menu UI + health bars + timer + round indicators
